plugins.name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
plugins.description: 12 agent roles. User-facing (8): Launch Pad (with mandatory Plan Review gate), Supervisor v4, Orchestrator, Code Reviewer (LSP, read-only), Red Team Reviewer, Product Owner (with --brainstorm ideation), QA Strategist, QA Executor. Internal (4): Execute Manager, Context-Keeper, Worker, Plan Reviewer. v10.3 adds QA topology auto-detection (REST/GraphQL/API-only/mobile/SSO), Gate 10 for GraphQL coverage, 13-gate Strategist audit. 47 skills, 10 hooks, persistent memory, bundled MySQL MCP.
